_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values
_provider_comment: Set to 'outlook' for Hotmail/Outlook, or 'gmail' for Gmail
_outlook_comment: Only needed if email_provider is 'outlook'. Get from Azure Portal > App Registrations
_gmail_comment: Only needed if email_provider is 'gmail'. Path to credentials.json downloaded from Google Cloud Console
_filter_comment: Emails matching these sender domains OR subject keywords are treated as newsletters
_server_comment: The URL your podcast server is reachable at on your local network
podcast_description: Daily newsletters from my inbox, read aloud.
_episodes_comment: How many episodes to keep in the feed
